positive: A stylized, whimsical illustration of a group of woodland animals (fox, rabbit, owl, bear) gathering together in a forest clearing at twilight. The style is detailed vector art mixed with a storybook watercolor wash, featuring clean, bold silhouettes against a gradient background of deep indigo and soft lavender. The animals are posed in a gentle, circular formation, looking curious and inviting. Focus on strong contrast and visible linework. Central composition, perfect for repeating apparel pattern elements. Cinematic, high detail, concept art.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, noise, oversaturated, low contrast, bad anatomy, ugly, deformed, extra limbs, cropped, disfigured
